text: Subah se client ne contract cancel kar diya aur mera startup band hone ki kagar par hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakta kyunki ghar par chota baccha aur uski zimmedari hai. Hostel mein rehne wale mere kisan parivaar ko lagta hai ki main shehar mein set hoon, isliye main unhe bataye bina din-raat coding kar raha hoon. Mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki mujhe har haal mein placement pressure aur EMI ko sambhaalna hi hoga.

Contract cancel hone se business doob raha hai aur bache ko time na de pane ka guilt alag hai, par main rukna afford nahi kar sakta kyunki main hi first-gen earner hoon. Papa ne sarkari naukri na milne ke baad mujh par jo investment ki thi, usey zaaya nahi hone de sakta isliye thakan mein bhi kaam kar raha hoon. Mere liye 'break' lena ek luxury hai jo parivaar ki umeedon ke khilaaf hai, mujhe bas chalte rehna hai.

Main NEET dropout hoon aur ab is naye startup se ghar chalata hoon, par client ke jaane se sab khatam lag raha hai, phir bhi mujhe endurance dikhani hai. Raat bhar bache ko sambhaalna aur din mein naye clients dhoondna meri majboori hai kyunki kirana shop ka udhaar chukana abhi baaki hai. Main apni mental health ke baare mein soch bhi nahi sakta kyunki mera kartavya mere personal sukoon se bada hai.

MNC ka sapna dekha tha par ab is chote business mein contract loss ke baad survival ki ladaai hai, aur upar se naya baap banne ka bojh. Mere parivaar ki 'izzat' mujh par tiki hai aur main unhe dikhana chahta hoon ki aspirational family ka beta kabhi haar nahi maanta. Shareer saath nahi de raha par structural endurance hi mera ekmatra vikalp hai taaki bache ka future kharab na ho.

Client ke contract cancel karne se funding ruk gayi hai, par main rone ke bajaye office mein extra hours laga raha hoon kyunki failure ka koi margin nahi hai. Hostel life se hi seekha tha ki first-gen earners ko girne ki ijaazat nahi milti, isliye main bache ke saath waqt bitane ke bajaye kaam ko priority de raha hoon. Ye thakan aur guilt mere farz ka hissa hain, aur mujhe bas bina ruke endure karte rehna hai.
